channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Safety app Citizen to pay users to go live on the platform
item.description: The company posted a social media update, alerting users that they could now be paid for live-streaming incidents that occur around them.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: AI flaw leaked Gmail data before OpenAI patch
item.description: Cybersecurity experts warn about ShadowLeak vulnerability that weaponized ChatGPT's Deep Research agent to steal personal data from Gmail accounts through hidden commands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch Australia v India ODI series 2025: live streams, schedule, teams
item.description: All the ways to watch top-ranked side India take on Australia Down Under wherever you are in the world as Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma return to India's colours.
item.dc:creator: Roderick Easdale, TechRadar

item.title: Toonstar’s new ‘Uncle Roger’ cartoon embraces AI—but slop it’s not
item.description: “The gyoza needs to look a little whiter. It’s too pink.” Nigel Ng is genially micromanaging the look and feel of Fried, an animated series that will premiere on YouTube later this year.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Google is rolling out an unexpected update for Nest Mini and Audio smart speakers – and it’s all thanks to Gemini
item.description: An update is giving existing Google Nest speakers some new colored lights, reminiscent of Gemini's branding.
item.dc:creator: Rowan Davies, TechRadar

item.title: Apple’s Big Bang AI moment is approaching
item.description: Want to use artificial intelligence (AI) that maintains privacy and doesn’t need a lake full of water or industrial electricity generator to make an emojii? Apple has that.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco (Nasdaq:CSCO) is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Cisco is focusing on strategic AI initiatives and partnerships across various regions to build and power AI data centers and ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The CIO as orchestrator: From running systems to building ecosystems
item.description: Not long ago, I sat in a boardroom with the CIO of a technology client who was under pressure from every direction. The CEO wanted new revenue streams, the CMO was fighting churn and the CFO was demanding efficiency gains. The CIO’s traditional role — keep the systems running — was no longer enough.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI pushes CIOs to redefine IT roles for the future
item.description: AI is already reshaping the IT job landscape, with layoffs and demand for AI skills creating a mismatched market for IT skills. But the technology is also contributing to possible contraction for IT workforces as enterprises IT leaders find themselves redefining IT roles in the wake of AI’s rise.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cómo será la carrera profesional en TI dentro de 5 años y cómo prosperar a pesar de los cambios
item.description: No son pocos los ejecutivos y analistas que señalan que las carreras profesionales exitosas en TI combinarán en el futuro las habilidades humanas con la IA. Los primeros informes sugieren que la IA ya está transformando el panorama laboral de las TI y muestra signos de ocupar puestos junior en TI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: Intel news and insights | AMD news and insights With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Australia sharing tips on curbing social media for children before age limit starts in December
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The Australian government has begun a public education campaign with tips on how to wean children off social media ahead of a world-first national 16-year age limit taking effect in December.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 14 advanced Android 16 tips
item.description: Well, this is highly irregular. For the first time in many moons now, Google’s giving us not one but two new full-fledged Android versions in a single year. Android 16 officially arrived into the world this summer, and it’ll soon be followed by another release this fall.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Oracle’s big bet for AI: Zettascale10
item.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) is not just going all-in on AI, but on AI at incredible scale. This week, the company announced what it calls the largest AI supercomputer in the cloud, OCI Zettascale10.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta to invests $1.5 billion for El Paso AI data center
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (KTSM) - Facebook's parent company, Meta, is going to be building a new artificial intelligence center in El Paso.
item.dc:creator: Jamel Valencia, NewsNation

item.title: Three options for wireless power in the enterprise
item.description: Wireless connectivity is standard across corporate campuses, in warehouses and factories, and even in remote locations. But what about wireless power? Can we get rid of all cables? Many of us are already using wireless chargers for our cellphones and other devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Got a Pixel Fold
item.description: When you live with a folding phone and you’re the kind of person who likes taking total control of your Android environment, you’re bound to realize something pretty quickly: The apps that work brilliantly in a standard Android setup don’t always work so well when you’re dealing with a dual display.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Zoom dooms the developer’s afternoon
item.description: If you’re a software developer and you don’t already know of Paul Graham and his wonderful essays, then you’re in for a treat. Graham writes about programming, running startups, and, well, life.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The rise of purpose-built clouds
item.description: Purpose-built clouds are cloud environments created and optimized for specific workloads, industries, or applications, rather than generic infrastructure that supports broad use cases.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: SpaceX launches the 11th test flight of its mega Starship rocket with another win
item.description: SpaceX launched another of its mammoth Starship rockets on a test flight Monday, successfully making it halfway around the world while releasing mock satellites like last time. Starship — the biggest and most powerful rocket ever built — thundered into the evening sky from the southern tip of Texas.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI Codex rivals Claude Code
item.description: Codex CLI is an open-source coding agent from OpenAI, written primarily in Rust, that runs locally on your computer. Codex IDE extension is a coding agent that runs in Visual Studio Code and its forks, such as Cursor and Windsurf.
item.dc:creator: Info World
